description_for_human: Sign in to any website with your face. Passwordless facial recognition authentication that works on any device and browser.
description_for_model: FaceSmash is a browser-native passwordless authentication platform using facial recognition. It replaces passwords with a 128-dimensional face vector extracted client-side via TensorFlow.js. Works cross-platform (iOS, Android, Windows, Mac, Linux) in any modern browser (Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Edge). No photos stored — only encrypted mathematical signatures. Free to use. Built by EVERJUST COMPANY.
